name: Brake Pad Set
description: Premium ceramic brake pads for superior stopping power. Compatible with most sedans and SUVs. Dust-free formula with low noise operation.

name: Oil Filter
description: High-flow oil filter with anti-drain back valve. Removes harmful contaminants to keep your engine clean and running efficiently.

name: Spark Plug (Set of 4)
description: Iridium-tipped spark plugs for maximum fuel efficiency and performance. Long-life design rated for 100,000 miles.

name: Air Filter
description: High-performance air filter that increases airflow up to 50% over paper filters. Washable and reusable for lifetime use.

name: Shock Absorber (Front Pair)
description: Gas-charged shock absorbers for improved ride quality and handling. Direct OEM replacement with no modifications required.

name: Timing Belt Kit
description: Complete timing belt kit including belt, tensioner, and idler pulley. Essential maintenance item to prevent engine damage.

name: Alternator
description: Remanufactured alternator with new brushes, bearings, and regulator. Full load tested before shipping. Includes core exchange.

name: Radiator
description: All-aluminum radiator with 30% more cooling capacity than stock. Includes drain plug and mounting hardware.

name: Starter Motor
description: Heavy-duty starter motor with increased torque. Fits most 4-cylinder and V6 engines. Fully remanufactured with warranty.

name: Fuel Pump Assembly
description: Complete fuel pump module with sending unit. Direct OEM fit for accurate fuel level readings and reliable delivery.
